User.title: User
User.description: A user of the comic journal app.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

Page.title: Page
Page.description: A single page in the comic journal.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this page.

pageNumber.description: The sequential number of the page.

theme.description: The color theme of the page.

Todo.title: Todo
Todo.description: A todo item on a journal page.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this todo.

pageId.description: The ID of the page this todo belongs to.

text.description: The text content of the todo.

/users/{userId}/pages/{pageId}.description: Stores journal pages for a user.

/users/{userId}/pages/{pageId}/todos/{to.description: Stores todo items for a specific page.
